_comment: THE THEME REGISTER — PREREG_UNIVERSE_CURATION §11 Rule 0. The recorded hypothesis layer: operator-authored falsifiable theses + named deterministic sources + default cluster routing + provenance. NEVER loaded by the trading loop (config.universe.themes stays the loop-facing basket; this file is the auditable rule artifact + per-window admission record). Changes = dated operator amendments. provenance: 'operator' | 'generated' (reserved, PREREG_THEME_GENERATION_STUB.md).

nuclear_fuel.thesis: Global reactor life-extensions/restarts + the SMR pipeline outrun the uranium fuel cycle's mine + conversion/enrichment capacity; fuel-chain and reactor-tech names reprice before the buildout is consensus-priced.
nuclear_fuel.falsifier: Mine/enrichment capacity additions clear demand without sustained term-price escalation; SMR pipeline stalls (cancellations outpace orders).

grid_equipment.thesis: AI-datacenter interconnection demand outruns grid electrical-equipment supply (transformers, conduit, storage, superconductors), pushing multi-year backlogs at second-order suppliers the buildout narrative under-covers.
grid_equipment.falsifier: Equipment lead times normalize / datacenter capex digestion; backlogs shrink for 2+ consecutive quarters.
sources: GRID constituent file (ftportfolios.com etfholdings GRID, fetched 2026-06-09)

copper_supply.thesis: Electrification + grid/datacenter buildout copper demand against structurally constrained mine supply (the themes.json FCX hand-seed thesis, extended to the supply-chain basket).
copper_supply.falsifier: Mine supply growth or substitution closes the deficit; copper term structure stays flat through the buildout.

space_smallcap.thesis: Launch-cost deflation expands constellation / in-space-services demand faster than small-cap space revenue is priced; the primes are consensus, the small-cap supply chain is not.
space_smallcap.falsifier: Launch cadence or constellation capex stalls; small-cap space revenue misses compound for 2+ quarters.
